title: Login page not loading
description: Users are unable to access the login page after the latest update.

title: Payment gateway timeout error
description: Payment process fails due to timeout during checkout.

title: Profile update not saving
description: Changes made in the user profile are not being saved.

title: Dashboard data mismatch
description: Sales data on dashboard does not match the report export.

title: Email notifications not sent
description: System is not sending email notifications for new orders.

title: Search functionality slow
description: Product search takes more than 10 seconds to load results.

title: Broken image links
description: Product images are not displaying correctly on category page.

title: Admin panel access denied
description: Admin users are receiving access denied errors.

title: Incorrect invoice calculation
description: Tax calculation is incorrect on generated invoices.

title: Mobile layout broken
description: UI layout breaks on smaller mobile devices.

title: Password reset email delay
description: Password reset emails are delayed by several minutes.

title: Data export CSV corrupted
description: Exported CSV files cannot be opened properly.

title: Two-factor authentication issue
description: Users are not receiving OTP codes for 2FA login.

title: Session timeout too short
description: User sessions expire after 5 minutes of inactivity.
